programme.desc: From Elvis to Bono, find out which Rock Stars made the list as experts like Andy Summers, Art Alexakis, Roy Orbison Jr. and more count us down!

programme.title: Margaret
programme.desc: New York high-school student Lisa Cohen (Anna Paquin) inadvertently causes an accident in which a bus driver (Mark Ruffalo) runs over a pedestrian (Allison Janney). Guilt-stricken over her role in the woman's death, Lisa's mood swings from normal to furious, with her angry outbursts mostly directed at her mother (J. Smith-Cameron). Lisa reaches out to the dead woman's best friend (Jeannie Berlin)

programme.title: Evil Dead Rise
programme.desc: A reunion between two estranged sisters gets cut short by the rise of flesh-possessing demons, thrusting them into a primal battle for survival as they face the most nightmarish version of family imaginable.

programme.title: The Hole in the Ground
programme.desc: One night, Sarah's young son disappears into the woods behind their rural home. When he returns, he looks the same, but his behavior grows increasingly disturbing. Sarah begins to believe that the boy who returned may not be her son at all.

programme.title: House of 1000 Corpses
programme.desc: An empty fuel tank and a flat tire lead two couples down a terror-riddled road to the House of 1000 Corpses. House of 1000 Corpses is at its core a story of family - a cast of twisted individuals who, with each slash of a throat or stab through the chest, add bodies to their sick human menagerie.

programme.title: The Devil's Rejects
programme.desc: After a raid on the rural home of the psychopathic Firefly family, two members of the clan, Otis (Bill Moseley) and Baby (Sheri Moon Zombie), manage to flee the scene. Heading to a remote desert motel, the killers reunite with Baby's father, Capt. Spaulding (Sid Haig), who is equally demented and intent on maintaining their murder spree. While the trio continues to torment and kill various victims

programme.title: 3 From Hell
programme.desc: Crazed killers Baby Firefly, Captain Spaulding and Otis Driftwood unleash bloody mayhem after escaping from prison.

programme.title: The Art of Getting By
programme.desc: George (Freddie Highmore) is a senior at a posh Manhattan prep school, but his disaffected attitude leaves little room for toeing the line. He'd rather doodle and read philosophy, and he strenuously avoids his parents (Rita Wilson, Sam Robards) whenever possible. Unfortunately, George's attitude is endangering his chances of graduating. Then he meets Sally (Emma Roberts). George finds himself fall

programme.title: Broken City
programme.desc: Former cop Billy Taggart (Mark Wahlberg) sees a chance at redemption for past sins when New York City's Mayor Nicolas Hostetler (Russell Crowe) calls on him for a special job. Hostetler thinks his wife, Cathleen (Catherine Zeta-Jones), is having an affair and that it may hurt his chances for re-election. However, a bigger scandal than expected pulls in Billy right at the start of his investigation

programme.title: A Thousand Words
programme.desc: Jack McCall (Eddie Murphy) is a selfish literary agent whose fast-talking ways allow him to close any deal. His next target is New Age guru Dr. Sinja (Cliff Curtis), but the savvy doctor sees right through Jack. A magical tree appears in Jack's yard, and, according to Dr. Sinja, the tree and Jack are connected; every time Jack says a word, a leaf falls from the tree. When the last leaf drops, Jack

programme.title: Atomic Blonde
programme.desc: Sensual and savage, Lorraine Broughton is the most elite spy in MI6, an agent who's willing to use all of her lethal skills to stay alive during an impossible mission. With the Berlin Wall about to fall, she travels into the heart of the city to retrieve a priceless dossier and take down a ruthless espionage ring. Once there, she teams up with an embedded station chief to navigate her way through

programme.title: Rampage
programme.desc: Primatologist Davis Okoye shares an unshakable bond with George, an extraordinarily intelligent, silverback gorilla that's been in his care since birth. When a rogue genetic experiment goes wrong, it causes George, a wolf and a reptile to grow to a monstrous size. As the mutated beasts embark on a path of destruction, Okoye teams up with a discredited genetic engineer and the military to secure an

programme.title: The Mountain Between Us
programme.desc: Stranded on a mountain after a tragic plane crash, two strangers must work together to endure the extreme elements of the remote, snow-covered terrain. Realizing that help is not on the way, they embark on a perilous journey across hundreds of miles of wilderness, pushing each other to survive and discovering their inner strength.

programme.title: Queer
programme.desc: Lee, a solitary American in Mexico City, falls for a beautiful, elusive former soldier. Journeying together into the jungle, Lee sees, for the first time, the possibility of an intimate and infinite love.

programme.title: Opus
programme.desc: A journalist is invited to the remote compound of a legendary pop star who mysteriously disappeared 30 years ago. Surrounded by the star's cult of sycophants, she gets caught in the middle of his twisted plan.

programme.title: Contagion
programme.desc: When Beth Emhoff returns to Minnesota from a Hong Kong business trip, she attributes the malaise she feels to jet lag. However, two days later, Beth is dead, and doctors tell her shocked husband that they have no idea what killed her. Soon, many others start to exhibit the same symptoms, and a global pandemic explodes. Doctors try to contain the lethal microbe, but society begins to collapse as a

programme.title: X-Men: First Class
programme.desc: In the early 1960s, during the height of the Cold War, a mutant named Charles Xavier (James McAvoy) meets a fellow mutant named Erik Lehnsherr (Michael Fassbender). Despite their vastly different backgrounds -- Charles grew up with a wealthy family, while Erik lost his parents at Auschwitz -- the two become close friends. As the world teeters on the brink of a nuclear war, Charles and Erik with ot

programme.title: It
programme.desc: Seven young outcasts in Derry, Maine, are about to face their worst nightmare -- an ancient, shape-shifting evil that emerges from the sewer every 27 years to prey on the town's children. Banding together over the course of one horrifying summer, the friends must overcome their own personal fears to battle the murderous, bloodthirsty clown known as Pennywise.

programme.title: It: Chapter Two
programme.desc: Defeated by members of the Losers' Club, the evil clown Pennywise returns 27 years later to terrorize the town of Derry, Maine, once again. Now adults, the childhood friends have long since gone their separate ways. But when people start disappearing, Mike Hanlon calls the others home for one final stand. Damaged by scars from the past, the united Losers must conquer their deepest fears to destroy

programme.title: Stoker
programme.desc: India Stoker's (Mia Wasikowska) world comes crashing down when her father (Jacki Weaver) dies in a car accident. Adding to the girl's emotional turmoil is the sudden arrival of Charlie (Matthew Goode), an uncle whom she never knew existed. Charlie moves in with India and her unstable mother (Nicole Kidman), and soon India begins to suspect that this charming and mysterious man has ulterior motives

programme.title: The 33
programme.desc: Disaster strikes on Aug. 5, 2010, as a copper and gold mine collapses in Chile, trapping 33 men underground. With more than 2,000 feet of rock in their way, members of a rescue team work tirelessly for 69 days to save the seemingly doomed crew. Beneath the rubble, the miners begin an epic quest to survive, contending with suffocating heat and the need for food and water. With family, friends and t

programme.title: Green Lantern: First Flight
programme.desc: The Green Lantern must race against time to stop Sinestro from unleashing a sinister plot.

programme.title: Green Lantern: Emerald Knights
programme.desc: New recruit Arisia (Elisabeth Moss) joins forces with Hal Jordan (Nathan Fillion) to save the universe from the forces of Krona.

programme.title: Green Lantern
programme.desc: Sworn to preserve intergalactic order, the Green Lantern Corps has existed for centuries. Its newest recruit, Hal Jordan, is the first human to join the ranks. The Green Lanterns have little regard for humans, who have thus far been unable to harness the powers of the ring each member wears. But Jordan, a gifted and cocky test pilot, may be the corps' only hope when a new enemy called Parallax thr

programme.title: Final Destination 3
programme.desc: Six years after a group of high-school students first cheated death, another teen (Mary Elizabeth Winstead) has a premonition that she and her friends will be involved in a horrifying roller-coaster accident. When the vision proves true, the student and her fellow survivors must deal with the repercussions of cheating the Grim Reaper.

programme.title: The Final Destination
programme.desc: While enjoying a day at the track, Nick O'Bannon (Bobby Campo) has a horrific premonition of his friends and him all dying in a freak accident involving many racecars. Mere seconds before the vision comes true, he manages to convince them to leave. Although they cheat death then, the survivors each begin to meet a grisly end, and Nick tries to figure a way to escape a similar fate.

programme.title: Final Destination 5
programme.desc: During a bus ride with his colleagues to a corporate retreat, Sam (Nicholas D'Agosto) experiences a horrifying vision: the suspension bridge that they -- and many others -- are crossing starts to crumble around them. When his vision ends and, almost immediately, starts to come true, Sam takes quick action that saves a number of people, including his girlfriend, Molly (Emma Bell), and his best frie

programme.title: The Asphalt Jungle
programme.desc: Recently released from prison, Dix Handley concocts a plan to steal $1 million in jewels. Dix gathers a team of small-time crooks, including a safecracker and a lawyer, and the heist is a success until a stray bullet kills one of the men. As they scramble to pick up the pieces after the theft, the men let their greed get the best of them while entangling themselves in webs of deceit, treachery and

programme.title: Twin Peaks: Fire Walk With Me
programme.desc: In the folksy town of Deerfield, Wash., FBI Agent Desmond (Chris Isaak) inexplicably disappears while hunting for the man who murdered a teen girl. The killer is never apprehended, and, after experiencing dark visions and supernatural encounters, Agent Dale Cooper (Kyle MacLachlan) chillingly predicts that the culprit will claim another life. programme.title: Destroy All Monsters!
programme.desc: Scientists face Godzilla, Rodan, Mothra and more obscure Japanese monsters sent by she-aliens.

programme.title: Godzilla vs. Gigan
programme.desc: Godzilla and Anguirus fight three-headed dragon Ghidorah and huge bird Gigan at a cartoonist's theme park.

programme.title: Godzilla vs. Megalon
programme.desc: Godzilla and flying cyborg Jet Jaguar meet a giant cockroach and a big black chicken sent by Seatopians.

programme.title: Godzilla vs. Mechagodzilla
programme.desc: An Okinawan monster-god helps Godzilla defeat his bionic double.

programme.title: Son of Godzilla
programme.desc: In this Japanese monster movie, the massive Godzilla comes to the aid of his newborn son, who hatches from an egg on a remote island where scientists are conducting experiments with radioactivity. Revealing a surprising paternal streak, Godzilla tries to teach his much smaller progeny how to use his powers. The father/son team must then battle giant insects, including praying mantises and a formid

programme.title: The Return of Godzilla
programme.desc: Okumura witnesses a huge monster during a storm. Biologist Hayashida hears Okumura's story from Toto Nippo reporter Maki and concludes that Godzilla, who was buried 30 years ago, has come back to life. Godzilla then appears in Tokyo Bay.

programme.title: Monster-in-Law
programme.desc: Charlotte (Jennifer Lopez) is smitten when she meets Dr. Kevin Fields (Michael Vartan). So when Kevin pops the question after they start dating, Charlotte happily accepts. But she soon realizes that Kevin's mom, Viola (Jane Fonda), is not quite thrilled to have a new family member. programme.title: It's Complicated
programme.desc: Jane (Meryl Streep), a successful restaurateur, has been divorced from Jake (Alec Baldwin) for many years, although they remain friends. When an innocent meal together turns into an affair, Jane finds that she is the other woman in the now-remarried Jake's life. Meanwhile, Adam (Steve Martin), an architect hired to remodel her kitchen, is still stinging from his own divorce. He finds himself falli

programme.title: Despicable Me
programme.desc: Supervillain Gru, a man who delights in all things wicked, hatches a plan to steal the moon. Surrounded by an army of little yellow minions and his impenetrable arsenal of weapons and war machines, Gru prepares to vanquish all who stand in his way. programme.desc: The rise of country music legend Johnny Cash (Joaquin Phoenix) begins with his days as a boy growing up on the family farm, where he struggles under the scorn of his father (Robert Patrick). programme.title: Working Girls

programme.title: Friendship
programme.desc: A suburban dad falls hard for his new neighbor.

programme.title: Mickey 17
programme.desc: A disposable employee is sent on a human expedition to colonize the ice world Niflheim. After one iteration dies, a new body is regenerated with most of his memories intact.

programme.desc: Prima ballerina Dominika Egorova faces a bleak and uncertain future after she suffers an injury that ends her career. programme.title: Everything, Everything
programme.desc: Maddy (Amandla Stenberg) is a smart, curious and imaginative 18-year-old who is unable to leave the protection of the hermetically-sealed environment within her house because of an illness. Olly (Nick Robinson) is the boy next door who won't let that stop them from being together. After a catastrophic crash on an unknown planet, pilot Mills quickly discovers he's actually stranded on Earth -- 65 million years ago. Now, with only one chance at a rescue, Mills and the only other survivor, Koa, must make their way across an unknown terrain riddled with dangerous prehistoric creatures.

programme.title: Hitchcock
programme.desc: Following his great success with "North by Northwest," director Alfred Hitchcock makes a daring choice for his next project: an adaptation of Robert Bloch's novel "Psycho." When the studio refuses to back the picture, Hitchcock decides to pay for it himself in exchange for a percentage of the profits. His wife, Alma Reville, has serious reservations about the film but supports him nonetheless. Sti

programme.title: Companion
programme.desc: A weekend getaway at a remote cabin turns to chaos when it's revealed that one of the guests -- a subservient android built for human companionship -- has gone haywire.

programme.title: A Different Man
programme.desc: Aspiring actor Edward undergoes a radical medical procedure to drastically transform his appearance. But his new dream face turns into a nightmare as he becomes obsessed with reclaiming what he lost.

programme.title: Blood Father
programme.desc: An ex-convict (Mel Gibson) and his estranged daughter (Erin Moriarty) go on the run from her drug-dealing boyfriend (Diego Luna) and his vicious cartel.

programme.title: Red Riding Hood
programme.desc: Young Valerie (Amanda Seyfried) feels torn between two men. She loves Peter, but her parents intend that she marry wealthy Henry. Valerie and Peter are going to run away together, but her sister is killed by a werewolf before they can put their plan into action. The villagers call on the help of Father Solomon (Gary Oldman), a famous monster hunter who warns that the beast takes human form by day.

programme.title: The Wolfman
programme.desc: Though absent from his ancestral home of Blackmoor for many years, aristocrat Lawrence Talbot returns to find his missing brother at the request of the latter's fiancée, Gwen. He learns that a creature has links to an ancient curse turning people into werewolves when the moon is full. programme.title: Abraham Lincoln: Vampire Hunter
programme.desc: While still a boy, Abraham Lincoln loses his mother to a vampire's bite. He vows revenge, but fails in the attempt, narrowly escaping with his life. He is rescued by Henry (Dominic Cooper), a charismatic vampire hunter who instructs Abe in the fine art of dispatching bloodsuckers. programme.title: On Becoming a Guinea Fowl
programme.desc: On an empty road in the middle of the night, Shula stumbles across the body of her uncle. As the funeral unfolds, the cousins unveil the buried secrets of their Zambian family in a vibrant reckoning with the lies we tell ourselves.

programme.title: The Watchers
programme.desc: A 28-year-old artist gets stranded in an expansive, untouched forest in western Ireland. Finding shelter, she unknowingly becomes trapped alongside three strangers who are stalked by mysterious creatures every night.

programme.title: Sucker Punch
programme.desc: Locked away, a young woman named Babydoll retreats to a fantasy world where she is free to go wherever her mind takes her. programme.title: Valerian and the City of a Thousand Planets
programme.desc: In the 28th century, special operatives Valerian and Laureline work together to maintain order throughout the human territories. programme.title: Blue Beetle
programme.desc: Jaime Reyes suddenly finds himself in possession of an ancient relic of alien biotechnology called the Scarab. When the Scarab chooses Jaime to be its symbiotic host, he's bestowed with an incredible suit of armor that's capable of extraordinary and unpredictable powers, forever changing his destiny as he becomes the superhero Blue Beetle.

programme.title: This Is Not a War Story
programme.desc: Some veterans take part in an unusual art project designed to help them deal with the leftover trauma associated with their combat experiences.

programme.title: It

programme.title: Homefront
programme.desc: Hoping to escape from his troubled past, former DEA agent Phil Broker moves to a seemingly quiet backwater town in the bayou with his daughter. However, he finds anything but quiet there, for the town is riddled with drugs and violence. When Gator Bodine, a sociopathic drug lord, puts the newcomer and his young daughter in harm's way, Broker is forced back into action to save her and their home. B

programme.title: Flags of Our Fathers
programme.desc: In February and March 1945, U.S. troops fight and win one of the most crucial and costly battles of the war on the island of Iwo Jima. A photo of U.S. servicemen raising the flag on Mount Suribachi becomes an iconic symbol of victory to a war-weary nation. The individuals themselves become heroes, though not all survive the war and realize it.

programme.title: Distant Thunder
programme.desc: A Chicago teenager (Ralph Macchio) searches the Pacific Northwest woods for his Vietnam-veteran father (John Lithgow).

programme.title: Uncommon Valor
programme.desc: Col. Cal Rhodes (Gene Hackman), a retired Marine officer, holds out hope that his son, believed to be a prisoner of war in Laos, is still alive. Despite the government's refusal to help Rhodes, he assembles a group to find and rescue his son, including skilled soldiers such as Wilkes (Fred Ward) and Sailor (Randall "Tex" Cobb). Funded by MacGregor (Robert Stack), a wealthy executive also looking f

programme.title: Small Soldiers
programme.desc: When teenager Alan (Gregory Smith) buys a set of Commando Elite action figures, he's unaware that they have been programmed with military technology. The toys, including leader Chip (Tommy Lee Jones), spring to life and start taking their directives seriously, beginning by "killing" their enemies, the toy Gorgonites. But Archer (Frank Langella) and the Gorgonites won't go down without a fight. Ala

programme.title: The Outlaws
programme.desc: A group of outlaws awaken to their empty train heist bag. Interrogations begin as each cowboy becomes the focus in an attempt to unmask the thief among them. Tensions mount as each bandit struggles to clear their name before bullets fly.
Spartan king Gerard Butler leads his brave elite warriors against the all-conquering Persian invaders. Strong violence.

programme.title: Retribution
programme.desc: While driving his kids to school, Berlin-based American businessman Liam Neeson learns that his vehicle is rigged with explosives. Sky Original high-octane thrill ride.

programme.title: American Night
programme.desc: A highly coveted Andy Warhol painting re-surfaces, triggering a battle between an art dealer and a ruthless mafia boss. Sky Original film with Jonathan Rhys Meyers.

programme.title: Gladiator II
programme.desc: Lucius is forced to enter the Colosseum to bring glory back to Rome. BAFTA-nominated long-awaited sequel to Ridley Scott's historical epic.

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: The iconic lizard explodes onto screens as he wreaks havoc on the streets of New York. Can scientist Matthew Broderick find a way to stop the carnage.

programme.title: Morbius
programme.desc: A biochemist with a rare blood disease inadvertently infects himself with a form of vampirism. Marvel action with Jared Leto.

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: Desperate to save his sick daughter, a man enters a deadly televised competition. Edgar Wright directs.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: Action man Brendan Fraser goes head-to-head with the undead remains of High Priest Imhotep. All-out action with Rachel Weisz. Contains violence and flashing images.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: Blockbusting sequel with Brendan Fraser and Rachel Weisz battling a resurrected Egyptian priest and his evil hordes. Epic adventure. Contains violence/flashing images.

programme.title: The Mummy: Tomb Of The Dragon Emperor
programme.desc: Adventurer Brendan Fraser goes head-to-head with undead Emperor Jet Li and an army of terracotta warriors. Contains moderate fantasy violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Olympus Has Fallen
programme.desc: Gerard Butler plays the bodyguard tasked with saving the president when a North Korean mob storms the White House.

programme.title: The Toxic Avenger
programme.desc: A horrible, toxic accident transforms downtrodden janitor Winston Gooze into a new evolution of hero: The Toxic Avenger.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: The Shadow's Edge
programme.desc: Macau Police brings the tracking expert police officer out of retirement to help catch a dangerous group of professional thieves. Starring Jackie Chan.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Wise-cracking Miami cops Will Smith and Martin Lawrence fight to protect a witness and bring down a heroin crook. Action comedy.

programme.title: The Meg
programme.desc: Sci-fi action with Jason Statham, who must come face to face with a shark as he helps a research team stuck at the bottom of the Pacific.

programme.title: Venom: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Eddie and Venom, now on the run, face dangers from both worlds as the end of their symbiotic relationship grows near. Tom Hardy stars.

programme.title: Gladiator II
programme.desc: Lucius is forced to enter the Colosseum to bring glory back to Rome. BAFTA-nominated long-awaited sequel to Ridley Scott's historical epic.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: Action man Brendan Fraser goes head-to-head with the undead remains of High Priest Imhotep. All-out action with Rachel Weisz. Contains violence and flashing images.

programme.title: Gremlins 2: The New Batch
programme.desc: Cute furball Gizmo is reunited with his human friends Billy and Kate, who now work in the New York offices of an eccentric tycoon. However, it is not long before Gizmo has spawned a new generation of murderous carnivores, who quickly overrun the building - and a genetics lab where they produce even more startling mutations. Joe Dante's comedy sequel, starring Zach Galligan, Phoebe Cates, John Glov

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Boozy playboy Arthur Bach is content to drift through life without ambition and await the multimillion-dollar inheritance due to him following an arranged high-society wedding. However, on the threshold of the nuptials, Arthur falls for a penniless shoplifter and begins to doubt whether he wants to go through with the ceremony. Comedy, starring Dudley Moore, Liza Minnelli and an Oscar-winning John

programme.title: National Security
programme.desc: Two men dismissed from the police become security guards, but are forced to go on the run when they uncover a sophisticated smuggling operation. With the criminal gang and the LAPD both chasing them, the unlikely partners seem more intent on fighting each other than covering their tracks. Action comedy, starring Martin Lawrence, Steve Zahn, Colm Feore and Eric Roberts.

programme.title: Zoolander
programme.desc: Dim male model Derek Zoolander is stunned to find his career going downhill thanks to the arrival of an equally vacuous rival - but fails to realise he is merely a pawn in a dangerous game of international espionage and world domination. Comedy, starring Ben Stiller, Owen Wilson, Will Ferrell, Milla Jovovich, Christine Taylor and David Duchovny.

programme.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
programme.desc: A family tragedy woos Delia Deetz, daughter Lydia and rebellious teenage granddaughter Astrid back to the close-knit community of Winter River. Astrid accidentally opens a portal to the afterlife by summoning Beetlejuice three times. The mischievous demon ricochets between realms, wreaking havoc wherever he goes. Tim Burton's comedy sequel, starring Michael Keaton, Winona Ryder and Jenna Ortega.

programme.title: Dumb and Dumberer: When Harry Met Lloyd
programme.desc: The half-witted duo meet for the first time as teenagers and band together to face the perils of high school - and prove they are intelligent enough to leave remedial classes behind. Comedy prequel, starring Eric Christian Olsen, Derek Richardson, Rachel Nichols, Eugene Levy and Mimi Rogers.

programme.title: Blue Moon
programme.desc: Set over the course of one turbulent night in March 1943, Lorenz Hart, the waspish wordsmith responsible for The Lady Is a Tramp and My Funny Valentine, finds his life unravelling on the opening evening of his ex-partner's show, Oklahoma! Director Richard Linklater's biographical comedy drama, starring Ethan Hawke, Margaret Qualley, Bobby Cannavale and Andrew Scott.

programme.title: The Wedding Singer
programme.desc: A failed rock star carves out a career as a popular wedding singer, but his hopes for a bright future are dashed when his fiancee jilts him at the altar and he tries to shut himself off from the outside world. At one of his functions, a waitress catches his eye - but unfortunately for him, she is already engaged to someone else. Romantic comedy set in the 1980s, starring Adam Sandler and Drew Barr

programme.title: Yesterday
programme.desc: Jack, a struggling musician, gets hit by a bus during a mysterious event. When he regains consciousness, he finds that he is the only person who can remember the Beatles, and sets out to exploit the opportunity by passing their hits off as his own compositions. Danny Boyle's comedy, starring Himesh Patel and Lily James.

programme.title: Big Daddy
programme.desc: An immature 32-year-old is heartbroken when his girlfriend walks out on him. In a plan to win her back, he volunteers to look after his flatmate's five-year-old son, thus demonstrating he is finally ready to grow up. However, his ideas of childcare prove unconventional and chaos quickly ensues. Comedy, with Adam Sandler, Joey Lauren Adams, Jon Stewart, Josh Mostel, Leslie Mann, Rob Schneider and K

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: Three men on a stag weekend in Las Vegas wake up after a night of heavy drinking and find they have not only misplaced the groom, but somehow gained a tiger and a baby. Unable to remember the details of the night before, they set about piecing the clues together in the hope of finding their missing friend. Comedy, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms and Zach Galifianakis.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Alan reunite in Bangkok for another stag weekend, but having learned the lessons of their previous misadventures, resolve to keep this one quiet and alcohol-free. Things inevitably do not go according to plan, and they must once again piece together the events of a wild night they cannot remember. Comedy sequel, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms and Zach Galifianakis.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: Drinking buddies Phil and Stu try to help their troubled friend Alan get his life in order, only to stumble into another bizarre misadventure. The Mob have taken Alan's brother hostage and to free him, they have to track down manic gangster Mr Chow, who has escaped from a Thai prison. Comedy sequel, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms, Zach Galifianakis and John Goodman.

programme.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues
programme.desc: Nigel Tufnel, David St Hubbins and Derek Smalls reunite after a 15-year break for one final concert. Their progress is charted once more by documentary maker Marti DiBergi, who offers perhaps too much perspective on their new direction. Comedy sequel, written by and starring Michael McKean, Harry Shearer, Christopher Guest and director Rob Reiner, in his final film. Kerry Godliman and Chris Addiso

programme.title: Touch
programme.desc: Icelandic romantic drama. Spanning several decades, a man embarks on an emotional journey to find his first love who disappeared 50 years ago.

programme.title: Boy Meets Boy
programme.desc: When two young men cross paths in Berlin, a simple afternoon in the big city soon takes on a much greater meaning. Heartfelt drama.

programme.title: Miss You Already
programme.desc: Two best friends have their relationship tested when one of them falls ill with cancer. Drama with Toni Collette and Drew Barrymore.

programme.title: May December
programme.desc: A couple start to unravel after welcoming the lead actor in a movie about their notorious romance into their home. Sky Original with Julianne Moore and Natalie Portman.

programme.title: Beach Rats
programme.desc: Powerful drama about a troubled Brooklyn teen aimlessly drifting through summer while struggling to come to terms with his own desires. From Sundance winner Eliza Hittman.

programme.title: Erin Brockovich
programme.desc: Julia Roberts plays the gutsy mum who takes on a corporation polluting local water. Oscar winner from Steven Soderbergh, with the late Albert Finney. Strong language.

programme.title: Materialists
programme.desc: A matchmaker is torn between the perfect match and her imperfect ex. Romcom with Pedro Pascal and Chris Evans.

programme.title: One Battle After Another
programme.desc: When their enemy resurfaces after 16 years, a group of ex-revolutionaries reunite to rescue the daughter of one of their own.

programme.title: The Choral
programme.desc: A choral society's male members enlist in the First World War, leaving the demanding Dr Guthrie to recruit teenagers and experience the joy of singing.

programme.title: The Brutalist
programme.desc: Escaping post-war Europe, architect László Tóth arrives in America, where a wealthy industrialist recognises his talent for building. Oscar-winning drama.

programme.title: ...And Justice For All
programme.desc: Al Pacino, an idealistic lawyer trapped in a hypocritical and corrupt legal system, finds himself defending a self-righteous judge. Satirical drama.

programme.title: Miss You Already
programme.desc: Two best friends have their relationship tested when one of them falls ill with cancer. Drama with Toni Collette and Drew Barrymore.

programme.title: The Cut
programme.desc: Retired boxer Orlando Bloom returns to the ring for one last shot at the title, but must embark on an illegal weight cut program first. Language/violence/sex/mature themes.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Remakes
programme.desc: It's time to kick off your Sunday shoes with remakes in this edition of the Cinema List. From Footloose to The Italian Job, revisit familiar favourites with a fresh twist.

programme.title: A Good Person
programme.desc: Drama about how one split second can change the trajectory of our lives. Sky Original film written and directed by Zach Braff, starring Morgan Freeman and Florence Pugh.

programme.title: ...And Justice For All
programme.desc: Al Pacino, an idealistic lawyer trapped in a hypocritical and corrupt legal system, finds himself defending a self-righteous judge. Satirical drama.

programme.title: Widow Clicquot
programme.desc: After her husband's death, Barbe-Nicole Ponsardin Clicquot assumes the reins of their fledgling wine business, revolutionising the champagne industry. Drama.

programme.title: The Cut
programme.desc: Retired boxer Orlando Bloom returns to the ring for one last shot at the title, but must embark on an illegal weight cut program first. Language/violence/sex/mature themes.

programme.title: The Choral
programme.desc: A choral society's male members enlist in the First World War, leaving the demanding Dr Guthrie to recruit teenagers and experience the joy of singing.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: After a shipwreck, an intelligent robot called Roz survives the harsh environments of an uninhabited island with the help of wild animals.

programme.title: Mousehunt
programme.desc: Lee Evans and Nathan Lane are the bumbling brothers whose plans to renovate a valuable building are thwarted by a super smart rodent. Comedy with Christopher Walken.

programme.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Search for
programme.desc: SpongeBob journeys to the ocean's depths to face the Flying Dutchman's ghost, encountering challenges and uncovering marine mysteries.

programme.title: Dog Man
programme.desc: A man and his dog are fused together to turn into Dog Man. They must stop a cat from cloning himself and creating an evil kitten.

programme.title: The Boss Baby
programme.desc: Animated comedy about a youngster concerned that his baby brother is actually a power-hungry tycoon sent to destroy his perfect family life.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: When everyone's favourite marmalade-loving bear is framed, the Brown family must fight to clear his name. Top family sequel with Hugh Grant.

programme.title: DC League Of Super Pets
programme.desc: Dwayne Johnson stars as the voice of Krypto the Super-Dog, who must convince a rag-tag shelter pack to rescue the Justice League.

programme.title: Wicked
programme.desc: The Oscar-winning musical epic about the untold story of the Witches of Oz makes its debut on the big screen, starring Cynthia Erivo and Ariana Grande.

programme.title: Paddington in Peru
programme.desc: Paddington, with the Brown family in tow, returns to Peru to visit his beloved Aunt Lucy, embarking on a thrilling and mysterious adventure.

programme.title: The BFG
programme.desc: Adaptation of the beloved Roald Dahl tale starring Mark Rylance as the lovable giant who befriends a headstrong young orphan. From Steven Spielberg.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows
programme.desc: The turtles are back battling bad guys when Shredder busts out of custody and teams up with Krang.

programme.title: Look Who's Talking Too
programme.desc: Roseanne Barr voices the new addition to Kirstie Alley and John Travolta's family, and is just as opinionated as her toddler brother, voiced by Bruce Willis. Comedy sequel.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: After a shipwreck, an intelligent robot called Roz survives the harsh environments of an uninhabited island with the help of wild animals.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows
programme.desc: The turtles are back battling bad guys when Shredder busts out of custody and teams up with Krang.

programme.title: Harriet The Spy
programme.desc: Wannabe writer Harriet loses her book of secrets. What will her friends think when they find out what she's written? Adventure with Rosie O'Donnell.

programme.title: Super Charlie
programme.desc: Willie's dream of fighting crime with his cop dad is shattered when his baby brother Charlie arrives, who turns out to have actual superpowers.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: Family adventure about a gas-guzzling monster that takes up residence in the truck of downtrodden high-schooler Lucas Till.

programme.title: Transformers One
programme.desc: Discover the untold origin story of Optimus Prime and Megatron's friendship on Cybertron. Animated sci-fi with the voice of Chris Hemsworth.

programme.title: Chicken Run
programme.desc: Top animation from the makers of Wallace and Gromit. A tale of battery hens and freedom, with star voices including Mel Gibson.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: Married Michael Douglas has a one-night stand with Glenn Close, but the bunny-hating harpy isn't ready to say goodbye. Thriller. Contains violence/sex/mature themes.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: The Day Of The Jackal
programme.desc: When meticulous hitman Edward Fox is hired to kill the French president, detective Michael Lonsdale faces a race against time to track him down. Violent scenes.

programme.title: Patriot Games
programme.desc: CIA agent Harrison Ford becomes the target of an IRA revenge plot after he foils a terrorist attack. Strong language/violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon III
programme.desc: Tough cops Riggs and Murtaugh (Mel Gibson and Danny Glover) return for another all-action adventure in which they must confront a former cop turned crime lord.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 4
programme.desc: Mel Gibson and Danny Glover return to trade bullets with Triad kingpin Jet Li. Joe Pesci, Rene Russo and Chris Rock get in on the action. Strong language/violence.(122mins).

programme.title: Naked Gun: From The Files of Police Squad!
programme.desc: Leslie Nielsen stars as incompetent cop Frank Drebin, who is out to stop a plot to assassinate the Queen. Top slapstick comedy. Flashing images.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 2 1/2: The Smell Of Fear
programme.desc: Slapstick fun as detective Leslie Nielsen stumbles upon an evil plan to destroy America. Contains strong language and flashing images.

programme.title: Naked Gun 33 1/3: The Final Insult
programme.desc: Cop Leslie Nielsen is hauled out of retirement to save the Academy Awards from bombers. Anna Nicole Smith co-stars in this sequel. Discriminatory content/flashing images.

programme.title: Free Willy
programme.desc: A wayward orphan befriends a captive killer whale, but when danger comes calling he vows to release his new pal safely into the wild. Family drama with Michael Madsen.

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: A man trapped inside a magical boardgame is freed with a zoo-full of rampaging jungle beasts. Wild fantasy adventure with Robin Williams.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: When genetically-engineered dinosaurs break loose on a remote island, a group of experts are on the menu. Classic from Steven Spielberg. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: The Exorcist
programme.desc: William Friedkin's Oscar-winning horror about a priest battling to save the soul of a girl. Language/violence/mature themes/sex/flashing images.

programme.title: Seven
programme.desc: Veteran detective Morgan Freeman and rookie Brad Pitt hunt serial killer Kevin Spacey as he embarks on a seven deadly sins-centric murder spree. Classic crime thriller.

programme.title: Drunken Master II
programme.desc: A young martial artist is caught between respecting his pacifist father's wishes or stopping a group of disrespectful foreigners from stealing precious artefacts.

programme.desc: Spoilt brat Adam Sandler won't inherit daddy's millions unless he completes 12 years of school in six months. Vintage Sandler comedy.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby
programme.desc: Bridget's focus on single life and her career is interrupted when she finds herself pregnant, but with one hitch - she can only be 50 per cent sure of the identity of her baby's father after a pair of one-night stands. Is the dad old flame Mark Darcy or US dating guru Jack Qwant? Comedy sequel, starring Renee Zellweger, Colin Firth, Patrick Dempsey, Emma Thompson and Sally Phillips.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview-June 2026
programme.desc: Previews of the films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Mad About the Boy
programme.desc: Recently widowed Bridget enters the dating game once again, caught between her son's science teacher and a man 20 years her junior. Romantic comedy, starring Renee Zellweger, Chiwetel Ejiofor, Hugh Grant, Leo Woodall and Colin Firth.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary
programme.desc: A single woman begins a new year with resolutions to find love, quit her bad habits and take a step up the career ladder. Her plans crumble as she tries to deal with her mother's infidelity, get over a passionate fling with her boss and come to terms with her feelings for an uptight lawyer. Romantic comedy based on Helen Fielding's novel, starring Renee Zellweger, Hugh Grant and Colin Firth.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason
programme.desc: The disaster-prone journalist seems to have finally found the perfect boyfriend. programme.title: The Alto Knights
programme.desc: Two rivals fight for control of a major crime family. Director Barry Levinson's drama based on true events, starring Robert De Niro, Cosmo Jarvis and Debra Messing.

programme.desc: A Navy test pilot is shrunk in a ground-breaking scientific experiment, but instead of being injected into a laboratory rabbit, the tiny specimen accidentally winds up inside a hypochondriac supermarket worker. programme.title: 10 Cloverfield Lane
programme.desc: A woman survives a car crash, and wakes up to find herself in an underground bunker, belonging to a survivalist who claims that a devastating attack has left the outside world uninhabitable. As his behaviour becomes increasingly stranger, she begins to fear she is being tricked and resolves to discover the truth for herself. Thriller, starring Mary Elizabeth Winstead and John Goodman.

programme.title: The Fifth Element
programme.desc: In the 23rd century, the world faces destruction from a seemingly unstoppable force of pure evil. Meanwhile, a New York cab driver encounters a mysterious woman destined to save the Earth from its fate, and has to protect her from a scheming arms dealer and a horde of alien mercenaries. Luc Besson's sci-fi adventure, starring Bruce Willis, Milla Jovovich and Gary Oldman.

programme.title: Dead Man's Wire
programme.desc: After taking a mortgage company president hostage with a wired shotgun, a desperate man sparks a tense standoff that grips the nation.

programme.desc: Kyle and his friends hack for fun, pranking online scammers. Seeking a bigger thrill, they target a billionaire's cryptocurrency..

programme.title: Are We There Yet?
programme.desc: Attempting to win the favor of the newly divorced Suzanne (Nia Long), Nick (Ice Cube) offers to accompany her children, Lindsey (Aleisha Allen) and Kevin (Philip Bolden), on a flight from Portland, Ore., to Canada to see their mother. A mishap with a corkscrew and a metal detector gets the troupe banned from the flight, however, so Nick is forced to drive the kids in his prized Lincoln Navigator.

programme.title: Are We Done Yet?
programme.desc: Nick and Suzanne decide to move to the suburbs to create a better life for children Lindsey and Kevin. The contractor they hired to renovate their home has a rather odd way of doing business, complicating the family's move. Matters spiral further out of control when the contractor clashes with Nick but bonds with Suzanne and the children.

programme.title: Turbulence
programme.desc: Zach and Emmy's romantic retreat aboard a hot-air balloon takes a terrifying turn when they get hijacked by a sinister third passenger with a link to Zach's past. As the mystery of their secret relationship is revealed, their spectacular ride becomes a brutal chess match and a lethal battle high in the sky.

programme.title: Poetic Justice
programme.desc: Still grieving after the murder of her boyfriend, hairdresser Justice (Janet Jackson) writes poetry to deal with the pain of her loss. programme.title: A Stork's Journey
programme.desc: An orphaned sparrow is adopted and raised by storks. When the family leaves on its annual migration, the little sparrow attempts to participate in the long, arduous journey.

programme.title: A Stork's Journey 2
programme.desc: Richard gives everything he's got to become flock leader only to learn his brother Max has been given the job. After deciding to take flight and start a new life, Richard begins a journey full of thrills and surprises.

programme.title: The Nutty Professor
programme.desc: The grandson (Drake Bell) of professor Julius Kelp (Jerry Lewis) finds an elixir that releases an obnoxious alter ego.

programme.title: Sing Street
programme.desc: In 1985, a Dublin teenager (Ferdia Walsh-Peelo) forms a rock 'n' roll band to win the heart of an aspiring model (Lucy Boynton).

programme.title: Bandslam
programme.desc: A gifted singer/songwriter, Charlotte hires Will Burton, a new guy in town, to manage her fledgling rock band. She wants one thing from him: to help her win a contest against her ex-boyfriend in an upcoming battle of the bands. Charlotte's band comes together and seems to have a real shot at victory, while Will and dynamic guitarist Sa5m begin to make some beautiful music of their own.

programme.title: Free Birds
programme.desc: Pardoned by the president, a lucky turkey (Owen Wilson) named Reggie gets to live a carefree lifestyle, until fellow fowl Jake (Woody Harrelson) recruits him for a history-changing mission. programme.title: Joyride
programme.desc: Three excitement-craving friends get more than they bargained for when they steal a hit woman's automobile.

programme.title: Shanghai
programme.desc: In the months before the attack on Pearl Harbor, an American intelligence official investigates a friend's death in 1941 China.

programme.title: I Wish You All the Best
programme.desc: A high school junior comes out as nonbinary and is thrown out of their family's home. With nowhere else to turn, they move in with their estranged older sister and her husband. After enrolling in a new school, they find support from an eccentric art teacher and form an unexpected bond with a kindhearted student.

programme.title: Miss Virginia
programme.desc: An impoverished single mother is losing her 15-year-old son to the rough streets of Washington, D.C. Unwilling to see him drop out and deal drugs, she places him in a private school. But when she can't afford the tuition, she soon launches a movement to change the system that is destroying him and thousands of others.

programme.title: Burn Country
programme.desc: An exiled Afghan journalist moves to Northern California. When he tries to rise above his menial job on a police blotter by covering a local crime, he's drawn into a world of violence.

programme.title: The Back-up Plan
programme.desc: Tired of waiting for Mr. Right while her biological clock ticks away, Zoe (Jennifer Lopez) decides it's time to make an appointment at the sperm bank. On the same day as her procedure, she meets Stan (Alex O'Loughlin), a man with the potential to be her ideal mate. When Stan learns that Zoe's unpredictable behavior is the result of her pregnancy, he declares his commitment. As the due date approac

programme.title: Tracks
programme.desc: Accompanied only by her faithful dog and four camels, an Australian (Mia Wasikowska) satisfies her craving for solitude by embarking on a solo trip across the desert from Alice Springs to the Indian Ocean.

programme.title: The Moon and Back
programme.desc: High school senior Lydia Gilbert feels lost after her father's death, until she discovers a space opera script written by him. Equipped with a VHS camera and pocket change, she decides to honor her dad and make the script a reality.

programme.title: Morning Glory
programme.desc: Newly hired as a producer on a national morning-news program called "Daybreak," Becky Fuller (Rachel McAdams) decides to revitalize the low-rated show by bringing in legendary anchorman Mike Pomeroy (Harrison Ford). programme.desc: T.S. is invited to the Smithsonian to receive an award for inventing a perpetual motion machine. Without telling any of his family, he boards a freight train heading to Washington, D.C., to attend the ceremony.

programme.title: Bart Got a Room
programme.desc: Everyone is searching for love in director Brian Hecker's semi-autobiographical story. Danny Stein, a high school senior at the bottom of the social food chain, needs a prom date. programme.desc: Tarzan and Jane face a mercenary army dispatched by the evil CEO of Greystoke Energies.

programme.desc: A murderer-turned-magician nearly eludes bounty hunter Josh Randall.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh tries to help a man with amnesia rediscover his past.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A determined woman tries to prevent Josh from bringing in her father's killer for trial.

programme.desc: A crooked trainer is using a two-ton elephant to plunder villages and mines.

programme.desc: An Easterner hires Josh to find his fiancée.

programme.desc: An ambitious deputy sheriff finds an elusive criminal Josh has been hunting.

programme.desc: Josh saves his quarry from the noose so that he can testify in another town.

programme.desc: A woman's past provides a motive for why she murdered her fugitive husband.

programme.title: View From the Top

Donna (Gwyneth Paltrow) dreams of becoming a first-class international flight attendant and is willing to do whatever it takes to ensure that her dreams come true. The road to success, though, is rarely a smooth flight, and as she begins her trip she encounters more turbulence than even she bargained for.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby
programme.desc: Breaking up with Mark Darcy (Colin Firth) leaves Bridget Jones (Renée Zellweger) over 40 and single again. programme.title: Breakdown
programme.desc: While traveling to California, Taylor and his wife, Amy, experience a vehicle malfunction on a remote highway. Amy Taylor accepts a ride from a truck driver to seek assistance while Jeff Taylor remains with the vehicle. When the couple fails to reunite at a designated location, Jeff Taylor begins a search for his wife despite a lack of assistance from local residents or law enforcement.

programme.title: Camp X-Ray
programme.desc: A female guard at Guantánamo Bay forms an unlikely friendship with one of the facility's longtime detainees.

programme.title: Undisputed III: Redemption
programme.desc: Uri Boyka is an inmate trapped in the toughest prison in the world. He is ready to make his comeback in a lethal boxing competition for a shot at freedom.

programme.title: The Warrior
programme.desc: Set in feudal India, the film is a sweeping mythical adventure story about a lone warrior who renounces his violent role as the longtime enforcer to a local lord -- only to be murderously pursued into the Himalayan mountains by the lord, who refuses to accept his departure.

programme.title: There Will Be Blood
programme.desc: Silver miner Daniel Plainview (Daniel Day-Lewis) leads a hardscrabble life with his son, H.W. (Dillon Freasier). When he hears about oil oozing from the ground near the Western town of Little Boston, Daniel takes his son on a mission to find their fortune. Daniel makes his lucky strike and becomes a self-made tycoon but, as his fortune grows, he deviates into moral bankruptcy.

programme.title: Friday the 13th

programme.title: Friday the 13th, Part 2

programme.title: Friday the 13th Part VIII: Jason Takes Manhattan
programme.desc: Mass murderer Jason Voorhees (Kane Hodder) is resurrected from the bottom of Crystal Lake. After he kills a passing boat's occupants, he stows away on a cruise ship filled with a high-school graduating class bound for New York City. Biology teacher Charles McCulloch (Peter Mark Richman) is on board with his niece, Rennie (Jensen Daggett), who has visions of Jason drowning as a child. They escape h

programme.title: Baby Driver
programme.desc: Talented getaway driver Baby relies on the beat of his personal soundtrack to be the best in the game. After meeting the woman of his dreams, he sees a chance to ditch his shady lifestyle and make a clean break. Coerced into working for a crime boss, Baby must face the music as a doomed heist threatens his life, love and freedom.

programme.title: MS Dhoni - The Untold Story
programme.desc: M S Dhoni, a boy from Ranchi, aspires to play cricket for India. Though he initially tries to please his father by working for the Indian Railways, he ultimately decides to chase his dreams.

programme.title: Race 2
programme.desc: Ranvir treads through the world of the Indian mafia in Turkey as he looks to avenge the death of his lover and partner-in-crime.

programme.title: Motichoor Chaknachoor
programme.desc: Anita dreams of marrying a foreign-settled man. She chooses Pushpinder, a Dubai-returned bachelor desperate for a bride, but their expectations clash in hilarious and heartfelt ways.

programme.title: Phir Hera Pheri
programme.desc: Raju, Shyam, and Baburao's lives take a turn when a fraudster cheats them, forcing them to find a new way to repay a dangerous gangster's loan.

programme.title: Dream Girl 2
programme.desc: Karam secretly turns his female alter ego into a dancer and woos a millionaire''s son in hopes of clearing his family debts and impressing his fiancee''s father.

programme.title: Chennai Express
programme.desc: A man's train journey turns chaotic when he helps a runaway bride from a powerful family. Their adventurous ride across South India blends comedy, action, and vibrant cultural charm.

programme.title: Dhoom 3
programme.desc: A circus performer turns to crime to avenge his father's humiliation, facing off against a relentless cop. High-octane stunts, emotion, and revenge collide in this stylish action thriller.

programme.title: What The Fish
programme.desc: Sudha hands over the responsibility of her house and pet fish to her niece's fiance before leaving for a holiday. When she returns, all seems fine until she opens the bathroom door.

programme.title: Coolie: The Powerhouse
programme.desc: Deva learns his friend Rajshekar was murdered and discovers a chair that turns bodies to ash. With Preeti, he exposes smuggling ring and seeks justice.

programme.title: Saas Bahu Aur Sensex
programme.desc: Upper middle-class women leave daytime soaps to invest in the stock market.

programme.title: Hichki
programme.desc: A passionate teacher with Tourette syndrome turns her weakness into strength while inspiring underprivileged students. Her resilience and empathy redefine success and education.

programme.title: Saajan
programme.desc: Aman, an orphan, is adopted by his friend Akash's family. Aman writes poems under a pen name and falls for Pooja. Akash also loves Pooja.

programme.title: Action Replayy
programme.desc: Fed-up with his parents constantly fighting, a young boy goes back in time to make his parents fall in love. This leads to hilarious situations.

programme.title: Chhichhore
programme.desc: A tragic event reunites college friends as they reflect on friendship, success, and failure. Through humor and emotion, they learn that life's worth isn't defined by victory but by never giving up.

programme.title: War 2
programme.desc: Working as a mercenary, Kabir accepts a high-risk mission for a criminal network. But soon, his task pits him against his unflinching former ally.
